description: List of names on recto and verso with corresponding figures expressed in Greek/Coptic numerals, possibly communal. The dating is likely 15th-16th-century based on the paleography. Some of the names mentioned include: Yiṣḥaq b. Sadīd, Yosef b. Yaʿaqov, Shemuʾel Ṣevi, among many others. Requires further examination. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
